rules: Always verify changes with `npx next build` before reporting completion
Use the warm editorial color palette: backgrounds #FDFBF7/#FAF7F2/#F5F3EF, borders #EDE8E0/#E0D9CE, text #1A1A1A/#5C4F3D/#8B7355, muted #A09580/#B8A48E/#C4B8A4
Chat messages must be warm, romantic, and celebratory — like a loving wedding planner
Always read stepRef.current (not step state) inside advanceConversation to avoid stale closures
Preview sections must accept theme: ThemeConfig and viewport: Viewport props and use theme values for all styling
New WeddingData fields need updates in: types.ts, EditPanel.tsx (form + FIELD_SECTION), ChatPanel.tsx (STEP_TO_SECTION + handler), and relevant preview components
GSAP animations in WeddingPreview use gsap.context() with scrollRef — always call ctx.revert() in cleanup
Avoid Math.random() in SSR components — use deterministic values to prevent hydration mismatches
Image uploads use object URLs via processImage() in src/lib/image.ts — designed for future Vercel Blob swap
